title: What you will learn
summary: The deck follows the path a new author takes: choose a presentation, shape the content, review changes, and ship a checked archive.
note: The same concepts apply whether you are editing the included demo or creating a new deck.

cards.title: Start
cards.body: Pick or create a presentation, then give it useful constraints.

cards.title: Author
cards.body: Edit structured slides, attach materials, and keep context close.

cards.title: Review and ship
cards.body: Compare candidates, run checks, and archive the intended version.
